stemHtml: To avoid having to maintain a listening watch when using HF radio, a selective calling system (SELCAL) is used. The SELCAL code letters for Globe Air 621 are 'ALBM'. What is the correct phraseology for requesting a SELCAL check?

options.a: Globe Air 621 request SELCAL Verification from Gander radio, ALBM.
options.b: Globe Air 621 on 8891, request SELCAL check ALBM.
options.c: Gander radio, Globe Air 621, request SELCAL verification.
options.d: Gander radio, Globe Air 621 request SELCAL check, ALBM.
